name: juicy crush saga
description: Juicy Crush Saga is a fun and refreshing match-3 puzzle game packed with delicious fruits and juicy explosions! Match 3 or more fruits to crush them and create sweet combos. The more fruits you match, the bigger the blast! Enjoy vibrant visuals, satisfying gameplay, and tons of juicy levels that will keep you entertained!
instructions: Mouse Touch Swap fruits Drag Move fruit pieces Tap Select amp match Match 3 Crush fruits Match 4 5 Create special fruit boosters
